entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume crop targeted for hybrid development to increase production in India

entities.name: SELF SUFFICIENCY
entities.description: The state of meeting domestic requirements for a crop without relying on imports

entities.name: PIGEONPEA PRODUCTION
entities.description: The activity of cultivating and harvesting pigeonpea

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where pigeonpea production is focused

entities.name: PULSES
entities.description: A group of legume crops characterized by nutritional value but often low yields

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of crop produced, which is currently low and unstable for pulses

entities.name: LOW FERTILITY RAINFED FIELDS
entities.description: Environmental conditions where pulses are typically grown

entities.name: PULSE PRODUCTION
entities.description: The overall process of growing pulse crops

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The efficiency of crop production that needs to be increased

relationships.description: PIGEONPEA is a type of PULSES
PIGEONPEA PRODUCTION takes place in INDIA
PIGEONPEA PRODUCTION aims to achieve SELF SUFFICIENCY
PULSES are characterized by their NUTRITIONAL PROFILES
PULSES are associated with low and unstable YIELD
PULSES are typically grown in LOW FERTILITY RAINFED FIELDS
PULSE PRODUCTION requires an increase in PRODUCTIVITY
